name: codex-research-harness
invariants: Research Planner and Research Executor use separate bounded contexts
One Campaign uses one fresh configured Research Executor runtime profile and one fenced claim
ResearchPlan and Campaign lifecycle state is revisioned and changed through explicit transitions
Compute Jobs are typed, budgeted, and bound to the current Executor claim generation
Scientific claims live in an append-only evidence and falsification ledger
ChatGPT Project consultation never silently falls back from exact Pro
Scientific tactics are autonomous inside explicit human-owned external boundaries
